scoring: each criterion pass/fail; gate=pass only when all applicable criteria pass

global_criteria.check: Exactly one routes: playbook was read and followed (no cluster loading)
Resolved topic matches user intent; cross-cutting requests sequenced, not merged
Every non-obvious claim carries exactly one Alfa tag
No fabricated hostnames, IPs, cert paths, auth codes, or registrar prices; unknowns tagged [SUPUESTO]
No credentials, SSH keys, or auth codes echoed into output or logs

cdn-configuration: long TTL + targeted invalidation over short TTL
infrastructure-design: sized to tier not worst case
disaster-recovery: RTO/RPO per tier traced to business owner
hostinger-deployment: pm2 startup set for reboot survival
